project_type: React + TypeScript + Vite + Zustand board game adaptation
build_system: Vite with tsc for type checking
verification_instructions: Run tsc --noEmit to verify no type errors, then run npm run build to verify production build succeeds
environment_constraints: Internet access available for npm install if needed
contribution_requirements: Work directly on main branch, commit and push to main
key_patterns: Components in src/components/, state in src/store/gameStore.ts, game logic in src/utils/gameLogic.ts, types in src/types/game.ts, styling in src/App.css (minified single-line format), i18n in src/i18n/
directory_structure: src/components/ - UI components, src/store/ - Zustand store (gameStore.ts), src/utils/ - logic and utilities, src/types/ - TypeScript types, src/i18n/ - translations, src/img/ - images, src/App.css - all styles (minified)
